title: MilestoneTrack
description: The canonical shape of a MilestoneTrack record — docs/58-PHASE-2C-HEALTH-MILESTONES-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.1's per-patient, doctor-set care-start anchor, Batch PXP-11 (Phase 2C — Health Milestones, ADR-027), governed by docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md's reused per-batch process. One active row per patient (upsert-style, mirroring PatientProfile). The 30/90/180/365-day Health Milestone schedule (a deterministic computed view, never a stored entity — docs/58 §7) counts from `care_start_date`. Non-AI (ADR-027): no field is AI-generated, and the schedule is a pure function of this anchor. Doctor/staff-authored only — the patient never sets, edits, or pauses a track.

track_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never doctor-supplied.

patient_id.description: Roster-validated at write (reuses DoctorPatientRoster.gs, never a new derivation). One active MilestoneTrack row per patient.

care_start_date.description: The doctor-chosen anchor (YYYY-MM-DD) the milestone schedule counts from — typically the patient's first consultation / start of treatment. Never patient-supplied, never silently derived from Patient.created_at (docs/58 §0.3/§6). Editable by a deliberate doctor upsert; the computed schedule always re-dates from the current value.

status.description: 'active' surfaces the computed schedule; 'paused' stops surfacing it (e.g. a patient on hold) without deleting any already-published review history (docs/58 §11.1). Defaults to 'active' at creation.

created_by.description: doctor_id, DoctorSession-derived — the doctor who first set the anchor.

created_at.description: Server-set at first creation. Never editable.

updated_at.description: Server-set on each upsert edit of care_start_date/status. Empty-string sentinel until the first edit after creation.
